reviews.review_title: Better than most other VR games
reviews.review_description: So i got this game for the funnys, but it's genuinely a good game. The gameplay is incredible. There's so much to explore. Oh, and the soundtrack is insanely peak it's such a banger I paused my Spotify when playing shame. You can't turn the volume of the music up. It would be so much better if it had people in it. And it's better than any slopy "pet game" that has three hundred thousand random micro-transactions for no reason. I didn't see one micro-transaction whilst playing definitely worth the ZERO DOLLAR PRICE TAG.
Zane is chill and game is pretty good. Shout out to zane. Zane is chill btw.

developer_response.body: True, Also BP is chill like the play it. Yellow44 is chill like that I think. BTW Yellow44 is chill. <3

reviews.review_description: Funny game chill like that yellow is watching u
